task.name: operation_span_rdoc
paradigm_classes: a task that alternates a processing judgment with a to-be-remembered item
a serial-order reproduction task performed by keyboard navigation

stimuli.description: Spatial-location reproduction phase: an empty 4x4 grid is shown with a keyboard-navigable cursor (arrow keys move the cursor, spacebar selects). The participant reproduces the ordered sequence of highlighted locations from the current set.

response.correct_sequence_js: (() => { try { var d = jsPsych.data.get().values(); var stim = d.filter(function(r){ return r && (r.trial_id === 'test_stim' || r.trial_id === 'practice_stim'); }); var n = (typeof window.currentSetSize === 'number') ? window.currentSetSize : (window.efVars && typeof window.efVars.currentSetSize === 'number') ? window.efVars.currentSetSize : null; if (n === null) { var c = 0; for (var i = d.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { var t = d[i] && d[i].trial_id; if (t === 'test_stim' || t === 'practice_stim') { c++; } else if (t && /recall|response/.test(t)) { break; } } n = c; } if (!n) return null; return stim.slice(-n).map(function(r){ return r.spatial_location; }); } catch (e) { return null; } })()

stimuli.description: Processing/operation judgment shown before each memory item (the equation/operation the participant must evaluate before the next to-be-remembered location). Two-choice keyboard judgment; the page's runtime correct-response variable is the authoritative key when present. (Response mode inferred; confirm at pilot whether this is keyboard or on-screen buttons.)

steps.description: Advance through the instructions plugin pages (key_forward default is ArrowRight).

grid.note: Memory item positions are recorded one-per-row on the single-item presentation trials; the recall target is the last-N presentation rows for the current set (see recall.correct_sequence_js). Grid dimensions inferred from style.css (.box flex-basis 25%).

recall_navigation.note: Keyboard-navigated reproduction: cursor moves with arrow keys, spacebar confirms each target. Inferred from .response-active / .active-box / .spacebar-box CSS classes.

reasoning_chain.inference: Identified paradigm 'operation_span_rdoc' with 2 stimuli.
